case_title: PAUL L HELD VS. JACQUINTO B LLANOS et al

docket_entries.description: COMMON COUNTS/OPEN BOOK ACCOUNT/COLLECTIONS, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF HELD, PAUL L AS TO DEFENDANT LLANOS, JACQUINTO B DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          MAY-10-2002 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAR-08-2002 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       APR-12-2002

SANCTIONS OF $200.00 AGAINST PAUL L HELD FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: APR-09-2002 PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE APR-24-2002. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY MARIA TORREANO. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $250.00 AGAINST PAUL L HELD, FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: JUN-19-2002, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE JUL-05-2002. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY: DEBORAH NEVILLE. (212) NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
MINI-MINUTES FOR AUG-21-2002 1:30 PM FOR DEPT 212
ADDED TO PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR HEARING SET FOR APR-09-2002 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 212

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUN-19-2002 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE; OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). TO PAY OUTSTANDING SANCTIONS. NO ENTRY OF DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT UNTIL ALL OUTSTANDING SANCTIONS ARE PAID. OSC TO PLAINTIFF PAUL L. HELD. THE MAY-10-2002 STATUS CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUN-19-2002 CONTINUED TO AUG-21-2002 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 212 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
MINI-MINUTES FOR JUN-19-2002 1:30 PM FOR DEPT 212
MINI-MINUTES FOR APR-09-2002 9:00 AM FOR DEPT 212

CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO ENTIRE ACTION BY COURT AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING AUG-21-2002 AT 1:30PM. THE COURT FINDS NO GOOD CAUSE OR SUBSTANTIAL JUSTIFICATION FOR FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH THE PREVIOUS COURT ORDERS NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-21-2002 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: There being no appearance by either side in this matter as of this date and Commissioner Borick having reviewed the history of failure to comply with court ordered sanctions in this action, the court ordered this action dismissed for failure to comply with previous court orders. D. Carter, Clerk; Mary Hinds, CSR. 212

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-19-2002 Continued To Aug-21-02 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Plaintiff in Propria Persona is sanctioned $250.00, for failure to appear. The OSC is re-set to 8/21/2002 at 1:30 PM, in department 212. Proceedings reported by: Deborah Neville. (212)

STATUS CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-24-2002 Set For Order To Show Cause On Jun-19-02 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212

PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-11-2002 Sanctions
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. $200.00 sanctions imposed against pltf for failure to appear. Osc is ordered off calendar. Preceedings reported by Maria Torreano. (212)
